message:
fix: register 12 missing plugins in marketplace.json (#1680)

The marketplace registry only listed 20 of 32 plugin source directories,
so users running /plugin marketplace add ruvnet/ruflo never received the
remaining 12 — including ruflo-iot-cognitum, leaving /iot unreachable.

Added: ruflo-adr, ruflo-cost-tracker, ruflo-ddd, ruflo-federation,
ruflo-iot-cognitum, ruflo-knowledge-graph, ruflo-market-data,
ruflo-migrations, ruflo-neural-trader, ruflo-observability,
ruflo-ruvector, ruflo-sparc.

Marketplace now lists all 32 plugins matching the source tree.

Co-authored-by: Reuven <cohen@ruv-mac-mini.local>

files.patch:
@@ -105,6 +105,66 @@
